benefits.description: Planning to start Retatrutide for weight loss. Gained weight from 130 to 170 lbs post-COVID.
Hoping Retatrutide will help with inflammation leftover from long COVID

protocol_notes: Commenter planning to start Retatrutide but has not yet begun. Mentions researching titration schedules (ranging from 0.5 to 2.5 starting dose) and asking about splitting weekly dose into twice-weekly dosing. Plans to buy in powder form and self-mix. Previously prescribed Mounjaro but seeking alternatives due to cost.
